mapper.sql: a.id, a.plant_id, a.facility_id, p.name AS plant_name, f.name AS facility_name, a.alarm_type, a.alarm_level, a.message, a.value, a.threshold_value, a.occurred_at, a.resolved_at, a.status
mapper.select: SELECT FROM alarms a JOIN plants p ON p.id = a.plant_id LEFT JOIN facilities f ON f.id = a.facility_id WHERE a.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE alarms SET status = 'RESOLVED', resolved_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'OCCURRED'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM alarms WHERE status = 'OCCURRED' AND plant_id = #{plantId}
